title: DTDC International Enterprises is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: DTDC International Enterprises is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Warehouse Manager looking for your next big career move? DTDC International Enterprises in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About DTDC International Enterprises:
DTDC International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC International Enterprises!
